hops.context: NGC 1783 is well-known to host a large population of UV-dim stars.
In this work, we used MUSE spectra to add new constraints on the stellar rotational properties of these peculiar objects.

question: What method was primarily utilized to investigate the rotational properties of UV-dim stars in the cluster NGC 1783?

options.A: Radio frequency measurements provided insights into the rotational properties.
options.B: Photometric variability analysis was conducted to determine the rotational properties.
options.C: MUSE spectra were employed to analyze the rotational properties of UV-dim stars.
options.D: Infrared observations were used to infer the rotational properties of these stars.

explanation: The paper specifically mentions the use of MUSE spectra to analyze new constraints on the stellar rotational properties of UV-dim stars in NGC 1783. None of the other methods listed were mentioned in the context provided.
